topStories.description: The AINRC remains the mainstay of the Union Territory’s political landscape, a position once occupied by the Congress. The decision of businessman Jose Charles Martin — who has deep pockets — to venture into electoral politics may have changed the dynamics of the 2026 election in Puducherry

topStories.title: Somali army takes over key city in Southwest as state leader resigns
topStories.description: Somali federal government hails Baidoa's transition, urging peace and unity amid political changes and rising tensions.

topStories.title: Iran war wipes $120bn off Dubai, Abu Dhabi stock markets
topStories.description: The UAE's financial markets have been some of the hardest hit by the fallout of the US-Israel war on Iran.

topStories.title: Congressman writes to King Charles urging him to meet Epstein victims during US visit
topStories.description: While the trip is not officially confirmed, the King and Queen Camilla are reportedly planning to visit the US at the end of April.

topStories.title: Iran war: What is happening on day 32 of US-Israel attacks?
topStories.description: In an exclusive interview with Al Jazeera, Secretary of State Rubio said US war objectives would be achieved in 'weeks'.

topStories.title: US says Cuba policy unchanged despite allowing Russian tanker
topStories.description: The White House says US policy toward Cuba remains unchanged despite allowing a sanctioned Russian tanker.

topStories.title: The Silicon Valley congressional race is getting ugly
topStories.description: The primary isn’t until early June, but the CA-17 race between five-term incumbent Ro Khanna and tech founder Ethan Agarwal is already getting nasty. Agarwal entered the race in March, backed by a roster of prominent tech billionaires largely in response to Khanna’s public support for a proposed California ballot measure that would impose a […]

topStories.title: Quote of the day by Abraham Lincoln: ‘The best way to predict your future is…’
topStories.description: Abraham Lincoln, a pivotal figure in American history, rose from humble beginnings to become 16th President. His leadership during the Civil War and commitment to abolishing slavery left a lasting legacy of resilience and justice, emphasising the importance of active effort in shaping the future.

topStories.title: Sharks in Bahamas found to have cocaine and other drugs in their systems, study says
topStories.description: A new study found cocaine, caffeine and painkillers in 28 Bahamas sharks, with researchers saying tourists may be the likely source of the contamination.

dailyNews.title: Italy denies the US military use of its air bases to attack Iran
dailyNews.description: Italian press reports that the government has refuse to authorise US to land bombers at a base in Sicily

dailyNews.title: Scoop: House Speaker Mike Johnson's allies unleash $10M campaign to spotlight Trump tax cuts
dailyNews.description: The American Action Network says it's launching a $10 million ad blitz through Tax Day to promote the Working Families Tax Cuts Act across 37 congressional districts.

dailyNews.title: RILEY GAINES: Olympics finally picks biology over ideology to save women’s sports
dailyNews.description: The IOC's new female-only eligibility policy, enforced via SRY gene screening starting at the 2028 Los Angeles Games, marks a historic win for women's sports, Riley Gaines argues.

dailyNews.title: Trump admin official shreds NY Times over multiple corrections to report on Silicon Valley initiative
dailyNews.description: Jacob Helberg detailed the Trump administration’s "Pax Silica" investor consortium after The New York Times issued corrections clarifying funding figures and his remarks.

dailyNews.title: Common blood pressure pill could make certain cancer treatments more powerful
dailyNews.description: Telmisartan, an FDA-approved blood pressure drug, could boost a certain cancer treatment's effectiveness against tumors, a new Dartmouth study finds.

dailyNews.title: Nancy Grace slams sheriff’s handling of Guthrie case: ‘The fish stinks at the head’
dailyNews.description: Nancy Grace says the Nancy Guthrie abduction brought back memories of her fiance's 1979 murder, recalling that victims are "never the same" after a loved one is taken.

dailyNews.title: 'Useful puppet': Eric Swalwell in the hot seat after traveling to Doha on several Qatar-sponsored trips
dailyNews.description: House disclosures show California gubernatorial hopeful Eric Swalwell took at least six Qatar-sponsored trips to Doha across 4 years, which could ignite backlash.

dailyNews.title: Tiger Woods' ex-wife, Elin Nordegren, 'concerned' after DUI arrest following rollover crash: report
dailyNews.description: Elin Nordegren, the ex-wife of Tiger Woods, is reportedly concerned after his DUI arrest following a Jupiter Island rollover crash, citing their kids' close bond with their dad.

dailyNews.title: Yale student athlete comes forward to allege 'toxic culture' under athletic director Victoria Chun
dailyNews.description: A former Yale women's track and field athlete claims she quit due to a toxic culture and incompetent coaching staff hired by athletic director Victoria Chun.

dailyNews.title: Big business pulls back from LGBTQ corporate rankings in dramatic one-year slide
dailyNews.description: Fortune 500 participation in HRC's Corporate Equality Index dropped 65%, with only 131 companies submitting DEI data in 2026, down from 377 the prior year.

dailyNews.title: Sarah Ferguson’s 'fall from grace' deepens as York strips title under Epstein-linked scrutiny
dailyNews.description: Royal experts say Sarah Ferguson's Epstein ties have cemented a dramatic fall from grace, as York's unanimous vote highlights actions have consequences.

dailyNews.title: Russia allegedly sharing satellite intelligence on US bases with Iran, world leader claims
dailyNews.description: Zelenskyy warns Russian satellites photographed U.S. military bases across the Middle East in Iran's interests, signaling possible strike preparations.

dailyNews.title: WATCH IT: Speaker Johnson hears from Uber driver on ‘no tax on tips’ benefit: ‘big difference’
dailyNews.description: An Uber Eats driver said the "no tax on tips" deduction gave him a 20% larger refund, as Speaker Mike Johnson spotlighted the tax break ahead of Tax Day.

topStories.title: MORNING GLORY: President Trump is on the cusp of a historic achievement
topStories.description: Iran accelerated its nuclear weapons program and missile buildup after Operation Midnight Hammer, Hugh Hewitt argues, calling President Donald Trump's response historic.

topStories.title: Why Trump faces an agonizing decision on obliterating Iran’s oil supply if he can’t get a deal
topStories.description: Trump threatens to obliterate Iran's oil and power infrastructure on Truth Social while envoys reportedly pursue a nuclear deal through back-channel talks.

topStories.title: Trump Faces a Decision on Whether to Start a Ground War in Iran
topStories.description: The president wants a negotiation, but the Iranians say they are refusing until a cease-fire is declared. And while Marines and the 82nd Airborne Division offer new leverage, the risks escalate quickly.

topStories.title: Deaths in ICE Custody Are Growing, and Trump Defends Ballroom Plans
topStories.description: Plus, a three-minute, multimillion-dollar art heist.

topStories.title: For Trump, the Artemis II Moon Mission Offers a Shot to Cement His Legacy
topStories.description: No president since the Apollo era has pushed harder to return to the moon than President Trump. But he wants a space achievement that is about “more than getting rocks this time.”

topStories.title: After Months of Threats, Trump Softens His Stance on Blocking Oil to Cuba
topStories.description: The White House press secretary said the United States would evaluate oil shipments to Cuba on a “case-by-case basis,” after a Russian tanker full of crude reached the island.

topStories.title: Edward Russo Says Donald Trump Is an ‘Environmental Hero’
topStories.description: Edward Russo, the only member of a White House task force, thinks the president doesn’t get enough credit for conservation at his golf courses, among other things.

topStories.title: Trump Reveals New Look for White House Ballroom After Times Article
topStories.description: Architects and preservation organizations have warned that little scrutiny has been given to the project’s design plans.

dailyNews.title: DeSantis Signs Bill to Rename Florida Airport for Trump
dailyNews.description: The airport near West Palm Beach will be rebranded the President Donald J. Trump International Airport on July 1, if approved by the Federal Aviation Administration.

dailyNews.title: Medicaid cuts threaten hundreds of hospitals, new report finds
dailyNews.description: More than 400 hospitals across the United States are at high risk of closing or cutting services because of the Medicaid cuts in President Donald Trump’s “big, beautiful bill,” according to an analysis from the progressive watchdog group Public Citizen

dailyNews.title: Trump shares renderings of his presidential library — a massive skyscraper in Miami
dailyNews.description: The mocked-up library dwarfs the nearby Freedom Tower, a downtown Miami landmark.

dailyNews.title: WH pressed on Trump’s threat to hit civilian infrastructure in Iran
dailyNews.description: In a post on Truth Social, President Donald Trump threatened the destruction of Iran's civilian energy and water infrastructure if a deal to end the war and reopen the crucial Strait of Hormuz is not reached soon. NBC News' Garrett Haake questioned White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt about the president's threat.

dailyNews.title: Supreme Court to weigh Trump's bid to end birthright citizenship
dailyNews.description: The Supreme Court will consider the legality of President Trump's executive order seeking to end birthright citizenship.

dailyNews.title: Trump threatens to invade Iran, "obliterate" its energy resources
dailyNews.description: Energy markets remain volatile as President Trump threatens Iran with an invasion to seize its oil while also suggesting a deal could soon end the war.

dailyNews.title: 3/23: Face the Nation
dailyNews.description: This week on "Face the Nation with Margaret Brennan," National Security Adviser Mike Waltz and Senate Homeland Security chair Rand Paul join as the backlash grows against the Trump administration for the deportation of alleged Venezuelan gang members. Plus. House intelligence committee member Democratic Rep. Jim Himes joins.

dailyNews.title: DeSantis signs bill to rename Palm Beach airport after Trump
dailyNews.description: President Trump's family business filed a trademark application for the name in February in response to the Florida bill.

dailyNews.title: Army investigates helicopter flyby at Kid Rock's Nashville home
dailyNews.description: Kid Rock is a leading supporter of President Donald Trump, the subject of "No Kings" demonstrations around the U.S. on the day the helicopters showed up.

dailyNews.title: Iran live updates: Israel and Gulf states report new Iranian strikes, tanker hit
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced "major combat operations" against Iran on Feb. 28, with massive joint U.S.-Israeli strikes.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  ‘No Kings’ protests around the country
dailyNews.description: Across the country, millions of people attend “No Kings” protests, calling out President Donald Trump and his administration’s policies, including Bruce Springsteen.

dailyNews.title: WATCH:  White House: 'Operation Epic Fury is moving ahead successfully'
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt said Monday more than 11,000 Iranian targets have been struck during "Operation Epic Fury."
